
\newcommand{\draftonly}[1]{#1}
\newcommand{\draftcomment}[3]{\draftonly{\textcolor{#2}{{{[#1: #3]}}}}}
\newcommand{\mz}[1]{\draftcomment{Mengzhou}{cyan}{#1}}
\newcommand{\zhiyuan}[1]{\draftcomment{Zhiyuan}{blue}{#1}}
\newcommand{\tianyu}[1]{\draftcomment{Tianyu}{orange}{#1}}
\newcommand{\danqi}[1]{\draftcomment{Danqi}{cyan}{#1}}

\newcommand{\todo}[1]{\draftcomment{TODO}{red}{#1}}

\newcommand\ts[1]{\textsc{#1}}
\newcommand\tf[1]{\textbf{#1}}

\newcommand\tmp[1]{\color{gray}{#1}}
\newcommand\warn[1]{\textbf{\color{red}{#1}}}

\newcommand\mc[1]{\mathcal{#1}}
